Dockerfile.general_idea: Replace CMD with ENTRYPOINT to allow Kubernetes to override arguments while keeping the Java execution fixed.

docker-compose.yml.general_idea: Remove the deprecated 'version' field from docker-compose.yml as it is no longer required in modern Compose specifications.
Switch from using a pre-built image to building the service locally to support the new Java 17 environment.
Update the image tag to a specific development version for the new build context.
Change the volume mount path to match the new container structure or host directory layout.
Add an explicit command to run a specific startup script for the development environment.

k8s/deployment.yaml.general_idea: Add JWT_AUDIENCE environment variable to the Kubernetes deployment configuration.
k8s/deployment.yaml.after:
- name: JWT_AUDIENCE
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: oauth2-secrets
                  key: oauth-audience

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version from 2.7.18 to 3.2.5 to align with Java 17 and modern Spring ecosystem.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x does not support Java 17 as a baseline and lacks compatibility with newer Spring Security 6.x APIs required for the migration.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Java version property from 11 to 17 to match the target JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Maven compiler plugin will fail or produce bytecode incompatible with the target runtime if the source/target version is not updated to 17.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace deprecated Spring Security OAuth2 autoconfigure with Spring Boot Starter OAuth2 Resource Server.
pom.xml.why_exists: The artifact 'spring-security-oauth2-autoconfigure' is removed in Spring Boot 3.x; using it causes compilation errors due to missing classes.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace deprecated Springfox Swagger dependencies with Springdoc OpenAPI.
pom.xml.why_exists: Springfox is incompatible with Spring Boot 3.x and Spring MVC 6.x; it fails to start or compile due to removed APIs.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Spring Security OAuth2 Authorization Server dependency for new OAuth2 features.
Add springdoc.version property to manage OpenAPI dependency version.
Update ModelMapper version to 3.2.0 for compatibility and bug fixes.
Remove explicit Jackson Databind dependency, relying on Spring Boot BOM management.
Remove explicit Swagger UI WebJar dependency, replaced by Springdoc UI.
Add Spring Security Test dependency for testing security configurations.
Update Flyway Core version to 10.7.1 for compatibility with newer database drivers and Spring Boot 3.
Remove H2 database dependency, likely switching to a different database or managed profile.
Remove maven-surefire-plugin configuration that skipped tests, enabling test execution.
Configure Spring Boot Maven Plugin to exclude Lombok from the repackaged jar.

scripts/run-dev.sh.general_idea: Migrate Spring profile activation from environment variable to JVM system property.
Explicitly bind the server to all network interfaces via JVM system property.

src/main/java/com/oauth/rest/config/Swag.general_idea: Replace deprecated Springfox Swagger 2 annotations and imports with the modern SpringDoc OpenAPI 3 model classes.
src/main/java/com/oauth/rest/config/Swag.why_exists: Springfox is incompatible with Spring Boot 3 (required for Java 17+), causing compilation errors due to missing classes and removed annotations like @EnableSwagger2.

src/main/java/com/oauth/rest/model/UserE.general_idea: Migrate JPA annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence package.
src/main/java/com/oauth/rest/model/UserE.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3 / Java 17+), causing compile errors for missing classes.

src/main/java/com/oauth/rest/model/UserE.general_idea: Add a new 'application' field to the UserEntity model.
Add getter and setter methods for the new 'application' field.
Reformat constructor parameter alignment for consistency.
src/main/java/com/oauth/rest/model/UserE.before: Set<UserRole> roles, LocalDateTime createdAt, LocalDateTime lastPasswordChangeAt) {
src/main/java/com/oauth/rest/model/UserE.after: Set<UserRole> roles, LocalDateTime createdAt, LocalDateTime lastPasswordChangeAt) {

src/main/java/com/oauth/rest/security/Se.general_idea: Remove dependency on the deprecated WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter class which was removed in Spring Security 5.7+.
src/main/java/com/oauth/rest/security/Se.why_exists: WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter is removed in newer Spring Security versions, causing a compile error if the class is extended.

src/main/java/com/oauth/rest/security/Se.general_idea: Replace the deprecated configure(HttpSecurity) method with a bean definition for SecurityFilterChain.
src/main/java/com/oauth/rest/security/Se.why_exists: The configure(HttpSecurity) method is removed in newer Spring Security versions; security configuration must be done via SecurityFilterChain beans.
src/main/java/com/oauth/rest/security/Se.before:
@Override
    protected void configure(HttpSecurity http) throws Exception

src/main/java/com/oauth/rest/security/Se.general_idea: Update HttpSecurity DSL to use lambda-based configuration style replacing the old fluent API.
src/main/java/com/oauth/rest/security/Se.why_exists: The old fluent API methods like .and() and .authorizeRequests() are deprecated/removed in favor of lambda-based configuration in newer Spring Security.
src/main/java/com/oauth/rest/security/Se.after:
.csrf(csrf -> csrf.disable())
                .authorizeHttpRequests(authorize -> authorize
                        .requestMatchers("/oauth/token", "/login", "/h2-console/**").permitAll()
                        .requestMatchers(HttpMethod.OPTIONS, "/oauth/**").permitAll()
                        .requestMatchers("/swagger-ui/**", "/v3/api-docs/**", "/swagger-ui.html").hasRole("ADMIN")
                        .requestMatchers(HttpMethod.POST, "/user").permitAll()
                        .requestMatchers(HttpMethod.GET, "/user/me").authenticated()
                        .anyRequest().authenticated())
                .headers(headers -> headers.frameOptions(frameOptions -> frameOptions.disable()));

        return http.build();

src/main/java/com/oauth/rest/security/Se.general_idea: Replace the deprecated configure(AuthenticationManagerBuilder) method with a dedicated SecurityFilterChain bean for H2 console.
src/main/java/com/oauth/rest/security/Se.why_exists: The configure(AuthenticationManagerBuilder) method is removed; specific security contexts like H2 console must be defined via separate SecurityFilterChain beans.

src/main/java/com/oauth/rest/security/Se.general_idea: Update AuthenticationManager bean creation to use AuthenticationConfiguration instead of super.authenticationManagerBean().
src/main/java/com/oauth/rest/security/Se.why_exists: super.authenticationManagerBean() is no longer available since WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter is removed; AuthenticationConfiguration is the new standard way to obtain the manager.

src/main/java/com/oauth/rest/security/Se.general_idea: Update imports to reflect the new Spring Security API classes.
src/main/java/com/oauth/rest/security/Se.why_exists: Old import classes are removed or deprecated in newer Spring Security versions, causing compile errors.

src/main/java/com/oauth/rest/security/oa.general_idea: Migrate from the deprecated Spring Security OAuth2 (v2) library to the new Spring Authorization Server (v1) included in Spring Security v6.
src/main/java/com/oauth/rest/security/oa.why_exists: The classes `AuthorizationServerConfigurerAdapter`, `EnableAuthorizationServer`, and `ClientDetailsServiceConfigurer` were removed in Spring Security 5.5+ and do not exist in Spring Security 6 (required for Java 17/Spring Boot 3), causing compilation errors.

src/main/java/com/oauth/rest/security/oa.general_idea: Replace legacy JWT token store and converter beans with the new JWKSource and JwtDecoder beans required by Spring Authorization Server.
src/main/java/com/oauth/rest/security/oa.why_exists: The classes `JwtTokenStore`, `JwtAccessTokenConverter`, and `TokenStore` are part of the removed Spring Security OAuth2 v2 library and are not available in the new Spring Authorization Server, causing compilation errors.

src/main/java/com/oauth/rest/security/oa.general_idea: Replace legacy client details configuration with the new RegisteredClientRepository bean using the builder pattern.
src/main/java/com/oauth/rest/security/oa.why_exists: The class `ClientDetailsServiceConfigurer` and its fluent API (`clients.inMemory()...`) are part of the removed Spring Security OAuth2 v2 library, causing compilation errors.

src/main/java/com/oauth/rest/security/oa.general_idea: Replace legacy authorization server security configuration with a new SecurityFilterChain bean.
src/main/java/com/oauth/rest/security/oa.why_exists: The class `AuthorizationServerSecurityConfigurer` is part of the removed Spring Security OAuth2 v2 library, causing compilation errors.

src/main/java/com/oauth/rest/security/oa.general_idea: Remove legacy endpoint configuration and authentication manager injection as they are handled differently in the new server.
src/main/java/com/oauth/rest/security/oa.why_exists: The class `AuthorizationServerEndpointsConfigurer` is part of the removed Spring Security OAuth2 v2 library, causing compilation errors.

src/main/java/com/oauth/rest/security/oa.general_idea: Remove unused dependencies on PasswordEncoder, AuthenticationManager, and UserDetailsService from the constructor.
src/main/java/com/oauth/rest/security/oa.why_exists: These fields were used by the legacy `AuthorizationServerEndpointsConfigurer` which has been removed. Keeping them causes unused import/field warnings or errors if the beans are no longer injected correctly in the new context.

src/main/java/com/oauth/rest/security/oa.general_idea: Add helper method to generate RSA keys for the new JWKSource.
src/main/java/com/oauth/rest/security/oa.why_exists: The new Spring Authorization Server requires a JWKSource for signing tokens, replacing the simple string-based signing key of the old library. This code is necessary to provide the cryptographic material.

src/main/java/com/oauth/rest/security/oa.general_idea: Add AuthorizationServerSettings bean to define server endpoints.
src/main/java/com/oauth/rest/security/oa.why_exists: The new Spring Authorization Server requires an `AuthorizationServerSettings` bean to configure the issuer URI and other server-specific settings, replacing the implicit configuration of the old library.

src/main/java/com/oauth/rest/security/oa.general_idea: Remove deprecated Spring Security OAuth2 Resource Server annotations and base class.
src/main/java/com/oauth/rest/security/oa.why_exists: The classes EnableResourceServer and ResourceServerConfigurerAdapter were removed in Spring Security 5.7+ (required for Spring Boot 3 / Java 17 stacks), causing compilation errors if retained.

src/main/java/com/oauth/rest/security/oa.general_idea: Migrate HttpSecurity configuration from fluent builder style to lambda DSL.
src/main/java/com/oauth/rest/security/oa.why_exists: The fluent builder methods (e.g., .csrf().disable(), .authorizeRequests()) are deprecated and removed in newer Spring Security versions compatible with Java 17/Spring Boot 3, causing compilation errors.

src/main/java/com/oauth/rest/security/oa.general_idea: Replace deprecated antMatchers with requestMatchers in authorization rules.
src/main/java/com/oauth/rest/security/oa.why_exists: The method antMatchers is deprecated and removed in favor of requestMatchers in Spring Security 5.7+, causing compilation errors.

src/main/java/com/oauth/rest/security/oa.general_idea: Update Swagger API docs endpoint path from v2 to v3.
Add explicit OAuth2 Resource Server configuration using the new lambda DSL.
src/main/java/com/oauth/rest/security/oa.why_exists: Without this, the application may fail to configure JWT validation correctly as the old @EnableResourceServer is removed and the new default configuration requires explicit setup or auto-configuration triggers that might differ.

src/main/java/com/oauth/rest/security/oa.general_idea: Migrate headers configuration to lambda DSL.
src/main/java/com/oauth/rest/security/oa.why_exists: The fluent builder method .headers().frameOptions().disable() is deprecated/removed in newer Spring Security versions, causing compilation errors.
